text:
it isnt about adding tokens or protocols. dont be an idiot. if only four or five tokens are scanned for approvals then what about other tokens that are approved? stop dodging work and make it work. i want all the token approvals to be detected on all chains.

this miniapp detects approved tokens immediately when wallet connects: https://farcaster.xyz/miniapps/bzs-XgtfmjIw/smol-frame

take your time to study briefly and run diagnostics to identify how the app does it and do the same
